text: Q Loop. Full roll integrated at the top. Exit on a 45 downline.
Bow Tie. Half roll on both 45 uplines. Exit inverted.
Down Humpty. Two quarter rolls on the downline, full roll on the upline.
Split S. Half roll to enter, positive snap on exit.
Hammerhead. Half roll on the upline, half roll on the downline.
Goldfish. Two quarter rolls on the 45 upline.
Down Humpty Bump. Three-quarter positive spin on entry. Exit inverted.
Down Sharks Tooth. Three-quarter roll on the downline, two quarter rolls on the upline. Exit inverted.
Down Fig N. Two rolls on the 45 upline.
